target: 20. Visit from Sou

Hey Shinpei!
Sorry…
Did I come too early?

(Searching for Hishigata Clinic.
There's no other way out)

(He should be trustworthy.
Sou risked his life to protect Mio)

No, I was waiting…
Sou.
Hey Shinpei!
Sou…

Sorry…
Did I come too early?
No, I was waiting.
(First, we need to share information)

(That way we can organize our thoughts,
and more importantly--)
(Sou. He's someone I can rely on!)
Let's just be honest with each other.

(The truth about Ushio's death.
The Shadow…)

Okay…
We can talk privately here.
Sou, listen to my story.
O-oh.

Then there's Mio too…
I'll explain about the Kobayakawa house again.
…Yeah.

(He listened quietly
to the end of my whole story)

I met someone at that house… 
No, a Shadow in Shiori-chan's form.

Shiori-chan had already become a Shadow
before Ushio's funeral.

…So, Sou…
I…
I get it.

Ushio was killed by Shiori-chan's Shadow.
You think that's what happened, right?
Yeah…

Ushio's neck, the Kikugawa line… strangulation…
It was definitely possible…
That's impossible… Shiori-chan…
…Next, is Mio-chan really the target?

Yeah…
I saw it with my own eyes…

(What's wrong? You should just say it.
She was killed right in front of you!)
(No, I can't…)

(…If I say it, I'll have to admit
I'm reliving the same day…)
(That's a big jump in the story, isn't it?)
(But lies and secrets always create cracks)
(If that happens, you might not believe anything anymore)
(It's better to just confess everything here)
…Shin-chan?

(…But how do I say it?
'Actually, I was killed twice myself!'?)

(If they think I'm joking,
they might not believe the Shadow story at all)
Shinpei!

Huh…?
Oh, sorry.
I was just thinking.

The Shadow and a real person…
Can you tell them apart at a glance?

…No.
I couldn't tell the difference.
At least not by looks.
That's troublesome.
So, maybe you're a Shadow too…
…That's true for both of us.

What is this…?
What even is a Shadow?
Calm down, Mio-chan.
In short, the Shadow…

is a creature that's lived on this island for ages.
Just think about it.
A creature…

A creature that imitates people…
A creature that turns the real thing into a 'shadow' like a stain…

That's right! Since they appear in photos,
they definitely exist here,
unlike ghosts or spirits!!!

If it's a creature, there must be a way to deal with it.
Right, Shinpei?!
Yeah… That's true!

(As expected of Sou.
He can analyze this calmly.
That's why he wants to be a doctor.)

(It was definitely the right choice to confess.
He's reliable.)

Hey Shin-chan!
Shall we go to Hiruko Cave now?!
Huh?

Karikiri might know about the island's history,
and might know something about Shadows too!!!

(That's right…
We were planning to go to Hiruko Cave anyway…)

(But it's not possible now!
Not at least for now!!)

(There's one of them near the shrine.
It's too dangerous to get close!)

Um…
Can we go tomorrow?

Tomorrow?
Tomorrow's the biggest busy day
for the shrine this year!

!!?
Oh… the festival…

I thought he forgot!
Tomorrow is the busiest day of the year
for the shrine…

The priest, Karikiri,
won't have time to help us, will he?

No…
Maybe it's even better this way.

The Shadow probably hates crowded places.
The more people there are,
the less likely it is to attack.

Yeah, that might be true.
They sneak around pretending to be people…
Okay, let's go with that plan.

Then see you tomorrow
at 5 o'clock to pick up Tokiko!
Got it.

Then let's set a password.
If we meet a Shadow,
we'll be able to tell the real one!
A password?
If you say 'mountain'…
…River?

Idiot!!
Everyone would say that!
Then… the Tigris and Euphrates rivers.
Stop talking about rivers, Shinpei…
Mesopotamian Civilization.
Mio-chan, that's it!!
Yeah…
Mesopotamian Civilization!!
(…I hope this works.)

Shin-chan, do you remember?
It's Mesopotamian Civilization!

Yeah, I remember.
Anyway…

Thanks, Sou…
For believing this story.
What a weird way to put it!!!

You believed me too,
and told me your story, right?
Yeah…

(…I still don't fully believe him…
Until we find a way to tell the difference
between the Shadow and the real person.)

(…I'm the one who's being skeptical…
I should stop raining on everyone's parade)

Oh, and I have something
I want to look into too!

If I find anything, I'll let you know!
See you then!!!
Yikes, a sudden shower!

The forecast is unreliable~.
Let's take shelter here.
Shin-chan…
Huh? What?
S-so…

Ah, tomorrow, Karikiri…
What time will he be free?

I don't know…
The mikoshi parade starts in the afternoon,
so he'll probably be busy with preparations…
Maybe after the Umi-okuri.

The Umi-okuri is from 8:30 PM,
and the fireworks start at 8 PM…
Mio?

Ah, that?
I have something to ask you.

Shin-chan…
How long are you staying on the island?

Yeah… I thought I'd leave after the funeral,
but I don't know…
You should've been there all along.

What?
I was just teasing!

Liar, liar!!
Hey, show your hand!!
Hm?

This is for you.
The necklace my older sister was wearing last.

If Shinpei has it,
my sister would definitely be happy.
…Thank you.
